text: بَشِّرِ الْمُنَافِقِينَ‌ بِأَنَ‌ لَهُمْ‌ عَذَاباً أَلِيماً

en.ahmedali: Give tidings to the hypocrites that painful is their doom.
en.ahmedraza: Give glad tidings to the hypocrites, that for them is a painful punishment.
en.arberry: Give thou good tidings to the hypocrites that for them awaits a painful chastisement.
en.daryabadi: Announce thou to the hypocrites that theirs shall be a torment afflictive.
en.hilali: Give to the hypocrites the tidings that there is for them a painful torment.
en.itani: Inform the hypocrites that they will have a painful punishment.
en.maududi: Give tidings of painful chastisement to the hypocrites.
en.mubarakpuri: Give to the hypocrites the tidings that there is for them a painful torment.
en.pickthall: Bear unto the hypocrites the tidings that for them there is a painful doom;
en.qarai: Inform the hypocrites that there is a painful punishment for them
en.qaribullah: Give glad tidings to the hypocrites that for them there is a painful punishment.
en.sahih: Give tidings to the hypocrites that there is for them a painful punishment -
en.sarwar: Tell the hypocrites that for them there will be a painful torment.
en.shakir: Announce to the hypocrites that they shall have a painful chastisement:
en.transliteration: Bashshiri almunafiqeena bianna lahum AAathaban aleeman
en.wahiduddin: Warn the hypocrites that for them there is a painful punishment.
en.yusufali: To the Hypocrites give the glad tidings that there is for them (but) a grievous penalty;-
fa.ansarian: منافقان را بشارت ده که عذابی دردناک برای آنان است.
fa.ayati: منافقان را بشارت ده كه عذابى دردآور بر ايشان آماده شده است.
fa.bahrampour: [و] به منافقان مژده ده كه عذابى دردناك براى آنهاست
fa.fooladvand: به منافقان خبر ده كه عذابى دردناك [در پيش‌] خواهند داشت.
fa.ghomshei: منافقان را بشارت ده که بر آنان عذابی دردناک خواهد بود.
fa.khorramdel: به منافقان مژده بده که عذاب دردناکی دارند. [[«بَشِّرْ»: مژده بده. بشارت‌دادن در اینجا جنبه ریشخند دارد.]]
fa.khorramshahi: منافقان را خبر ده که عذاب دردناکی [در پیش‌] دارند
fa.makarem: به منافقان بشارت ده که مجازات دردناکی در انتظار آنهاست!
fa.moezzi: مژده ده منافقان (مردم دوروی) را که برای آنان است شکنجه دردناک‌
fa.mojtabavi: منافقان را مژده ده كه آنان را عذابى است دردناك
fa.sadeqi: منافقان را نوید ده که برایشان عذابی دردناک است.
